name: Oruga
description: Lightweight Vue.js UI component library without any CSS framework dependency

description.value: Lightweight Vue.js UI component library without any CSS framework dependency

active-maintenance.comment: v0.12.3 released December 4, 2025; 85+ contributors; healthy release cadence

styling-approach.comment: CSS framework agnostic - no built-in styles. Official themes available for Bulma and Bootstrap. Uses class-mapping approach for full customization

component-model.comment: Ships unstyled by default but offers pre-built themes for Bulma and Bootstrap. Can be used headless or with styling themes

ssr-compatible.comment: SSR compatible with Nuxt 3 by default; some components may have edge cases

design-system.comment: CSS framework agnostic; no built-in design system. Descended from Buefy (Bulma-based)

dark-mode.comment: No built-in dark mode; relies on CSS framework integration or custom styling

theming-system.comment: Class-mapping approach allows full control over component classes. Can integrate any CSS framework's theming

css-variables.comment: Themes use CSS variables; SCSS variables also available for customization

design-tokens.comment: No formal design token system; relies on class mapping and CSS framework integration

rtl-support.comment: No documented RTL support; would need custom CSS implementation

component-count.comment: 32 components: Autocomplete, Breadcrumb, Carousel, Checkbox, Collapse, Datepicker, Datetimepicker, Dialog, Dropdown, Field, Icon, Input, Listbox, Loading, Menu, Modal, Notification, Pagination, Radio, Select, Sidebar, Skeleton, Slider, Steps, Switch, Table, Tabs, Tag, Taginput, Timepicker, Tooltip, Upload

multi-select.comment: Dropdown component supports multiple selection via 'multiple' prop

combobox.comment: Autocomplete component implements W3C ARIA Combobox Pattern with filtering, async data, and infinite scroll

radio.comment: Radio component for radio button groups

slider.comment: Slider component with range/dual-thumb support, ticks, tooltips, and custom formatting

number-input.comment: No dedicated number input with increment/decrement buttons; uses standard input with type='number'

tag-input.comment: Taginput component with autocomplete, allow-new, duplicate control, and validation

date-picker.comment: Datepicker with calendar, inline mode, min/max dates, events, and week numbers. Uses native Date object

date-range-picker.comment: Datepicker supports range selection via 'range' prop

file-upload.comment: Upload component with multiple file support

dropzone.comment: Upload component supports drag-drop via 'drag-drop' prop with visual hover feedback

input-groups.comment: Field component combines inputs with labels, help text, and addons

input-with-dropdown.comment: Autocomplete and Dropdown components can be combined with inputs

table.comment: Table component with basic data display

data-table.comment: Table component includes sorting, filtering with debounce, pagination, sticky headers/columns, draggable rows/columns, and backend integration

virtual-infinite-list.comment: No virtualized list; Autocomplete has infinite scroll for options but no general virtualized list

card.comment: No card component; CSS framework agnostic approach expects cards from chosen CSS framework

tag-chip-pill.comment: Tag component for labels with variants and close functionality

calendar.comment: Datepicker can be used inline as a calendar display

alert.comment: Notification component can be used as static alerts

toast-notification.comment: Notification component with toast functionality: queuing, positioning, duration, pause-on-hover, and programmatic API via useOruga()

progress-bar.comment: No progress bar component in current version

spinner-loader.comment: Loading component with spinner, full-page overlay, and programmatic API

skeleton.comment: Skeleton component with animation, circle/rounded shapes, width control, and count prop

modal-dialog.comment: Modal component with W3C ARIA Dialog Pattern, auto-focus, focus trapping, escape close, and overlay. Dialog component for confirmations

drawer-sheet.comment: Sidebar component slides from any edge (left, right, top, bottom) with fullwidth/fullheight options, teleport, and focus trapping

popover.comment: No dedicated popover; Dropdown can be used for popover-like behavior

tooltip.comment: Tooltip component with W3C ARIA pattern, multiple positions, click/hover/focus triggers, and multiline support

dropdown-menu.comment: Dropdown component with scrollable options, modal display, teleport, and W3C ARIA Combobox Pattern

context-menu.comment: Dropdown supports right-click activation via 'openOnContextmenu' prop

tabs.comment: Tabs component with multiple types (boxed, toggle, pills), sizes, icons, and W3C ARIA Tabs Pattern

vertical-tabs.comment: Tabs component supports vertical layout via 'vertical' prop

pagination.comment: Pagination component, also integrated in Table

stepper.comment: Steps component for multi-step processes with navigation, validation, clickable steps, and horizontal/vertical orientation

sidebar.comment: Sidebar component for collapsible navigation with responsive behavior

grid.comment: No grid component; CSS framework agnostic approach expects grid from chosen CSS framework

collapsible.comment: Collapse component with W3C ARIA Disclosure Pattern, can be combined for accordion behavior

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integration

chart-libraries.comment: No built-in or official chart integration

form-libraries.comment: HTML5 validation via useHtml5Validation config; no official form library bindings

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in animation props on components; uses Vue transitions

icon-libraries.comment: Configurable iconPack supporting MDI (default), Font Awesome, and others via Icon component

date-libraries.comment: Uses native JavaScript Date object; no external date library required

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow W3C ARIA APG patterns (Combobox, Dialog, Tabs, Disclosure, Tooltip)

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard support including escape close, tab navigation, arrow key navigation in dropdowns/menus

screen-reader-tested.comment: Claims WCAG compliance but no explicit screen reader testing documentation found

focus-management.comment: trapFocus and autoFocus props on Modal and Sidebar; proper focus management in overlays

wcag-level.comment: States following WCAG recommendations but no specific compliance level documented

accessibility-rating.comment: Strong W3C ARIA pattern implementation, keyboard navigation, and focus management. Explicit references to WCAG recommendations but no audit documentation

bundle-size-full.comment: Unable to retrieve exact bundle size from bundlephobia; unpacked size is ~4.2MB but minified+gzipped size not confirmed

tree-shakeable.comment: Components can be imported individually for tree shaking

zero-runtime.comment: JavaScript runtime required for component behavior

lazy-loading.comment: Individual component imports enable lazy loading via dynamic imports

documentation-quality.comment: Comprehensive docs with API reference, interactive examples, props tables, and W3C ARIA pattern references. Configuration guide and theming documentation

interactive-docs.comment: Live examples in documentation with code snippets

cli-generator.comment: No CLI tool; standard npm install

commercial-support.comment: Open source project with Discord community support; no commercial tier

style-override.comment: Class-mapping approach for full control; CSS variables in themes; slot-based customization

compound-components.comment: Some components use compound pattern (e.g., Dropdown with DropdownItem)

render-props.comment: Uses Vue slots rather than render props pattern

slots.comment: Extensive slot support for customization including header, footer, trigger, and content slots

unstyled-mode.comment: Unstyled by default; no CSS dependency. Override classes completely with 'override: true' config
